category_sources: source_facts.description says ykdl is a video downloader focused on China mainland video sites.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository for the video downloader.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository named ykdl.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface for this CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source project URL and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies video downloading for China mainland video sites.
source_facts.executables lists ykdl as a command-line executable.
source_facts.source-archive is a Python package source archive, supporting the python tag.
